name: How does Google Assistant optimization actually work?
description: It usually involves auditing pages, rewriting key answers, adding schema, fixing local profiles, and then testing voice queries to see what Google picks up.

mainEntity.name: How does Google Assistant optimization actually work?

acceptedAnswer.text: The process usually starts with a content and technical audit, followed by rewriting key pages in question-and-answer format, adding schema markup, and fixing local profile details. After that, you test common voice queries and track which pages or listings are being used as answers.
acceptedAnswer.description: It usually involves auditing pages, rewriting key answers, adding schema, fixing local profiles, and then testing voice queries to see what Google picks up.
